description_long: This is a modern ASUS laptop with a sleek, matte black finish and a subtle concentric circle pattern on the lid. The front features a full-sized QWERTY keyboard with a function row, a large touchpad, and a visible ASUS logo below the screen. The display is open and powered on, showing the Windows 10 desktop interface with various application tiles and a bright blue wallpaper. The laptop's chassis appears slim and lightweight, with a robust hinge connecting the screen and base. The exterior is primarily composed of plastic and metal, with some rubberized feet likely on the underside for stability. The overall design is minimalist, with only a few visible stickers and no ports apparent from the provided views.
description: A slim, matte black ASUS laptop with a full keyboard, large touchpad, and a powered-on screen displaying Windows 10. The lid features a subtle concentric pattern and a prominent ASUS logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with Windows 10 interface, full QWERTY keyboard, large touchpad, ASUS logo, and a sticker on the palm rest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile, hinge design, and partial visibility of the keyboard and screen; no ports are visible.
description_view_2: Top-down view of the closed lid, displaying the concentric circle pattern and centered ASUS logo; no other features are visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim profile, keyboard, touchpad, and sticker placement; no ports are visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The ASUS logo is visible on both the lower bezel below the screen and centered on the lid. It is silver, in all capital letters, and stands out against the black surface.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and powered on, displaying the Windows 10 desktop with application tiles and wallpaper.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard layout is QWERTY with a function row at the top, no numeric keypad, and a large touchpad below the spacebar.
attribute_sticker_placement: A rectangular sticker is present on the right palm rest area, near the touchpad, featuring some text and graphics.
